title: TheMealDB Vocabulary
description: Controlled vocabulary of terms, categories, areas, and field patterns used by TheMealDB API.

categories.description: Valid meal category names returned by /categories.php and used as filter values in /filter.php?c=

areas.description: Valid cuisine area / country names used as filter values in /filter.php?a=

fieldPatterns.description: Naming patterns used for parallel ingredient and measurement fields in the Meal schema.

ingredientFields.description: Ingredient name for slot N. Empty string or null if fewer than N ingredients exist.

measureFields.description: Quantity / unit for ingredient slot N. Corresponds 1:1 with strIngredient{N}.

imageSizes.description: Image size suffixes appended to meal and ingredient thumbnail URLs.

accessTiers.description: API access tiers and associated API key usage.

tiers.name: Free / Test
tiers.description: Public test key. Use for development, education, and open projects.

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.description: Lifetime supporter key (one-time £10 payment). Unlocks /randomselection.php, /latest.php, and multi-ingredient /filter.php.
